prediction.reasoning: Based on historical AAPL volatility of approximately 25-30% annualized, a 7-day prediction uses standard deviation of roughly 2.1% for weekly moves. Point estimate assumes slight upward drift consistent with long-term equity risk premium. Confidence intervals constructed using normal distribution assumptions around the point estimate, accounting for typical short-term price uncertainty in large-cap tech stocks.
